description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/images/testing-docker:ubuntu-bionic Docker image with a Docker-in-Docker service (registry.gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/images/docker:19-dind) aliased as docker, sets DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375 and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive, and defines a single build stage. Add a build_envoy job in the build stage that runs before_script docker info, then logs in with docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$CI_REGISTRY", builds the envoy image using docker build --cache-from="$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/envoy:latest" -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/envoy:latest" -f envoy.dockerfile ., and pushes it with docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/envoy:latest"; the job runs only on the master branch. Add a build_simple_ta3 job that performs the same steps but builds and pushes the simple-ta3 image from ta3.dockerfile. Add a build_tests job that builds and pushes the tests image from tests.dockerfile. Finally, add a build_wait job that builds and pushes the wait image from wait.dockerfile; all four jobs share the same image, service, variables, before_script, and master‑only trigger.
